coreClaim: Manual Illustrator paintbrush retries no longer send raw avatar or sprite reference image payloads in the LLM prompt-writing request, avoiding oversized upstream prompt requests while preserving capped references for image generation.

inScope: Illustrator agent LLM prompt request construction
Regression proof for omitted base64 reference images in LLM messages

claimBoundary.coreClaim: The LLM prompt-writing request for Illustrator contains text context only and does not include base64 avatar or sprite reference images.
outOfScopeClaims: No live Pi browser click was captured in this PR because the in-app browser connector failed in the local session.
This PR does not change the image provider's own reference-image request path, which already has a serialized payload cap.

contractLaneGate.brokenContract: The Illustrator prompt-writing LLM request carried raw reference image payloads even though the later image-generation request already owns capped image references.
contractLaneGate.impliedContract: The prompt writer should create an image prompt from text context; binary image references are for the image generator request where payload limits are enforced.
contractLaneGate.actualEnforcement: buildStandardAgentMessages now returns text messages directly for Illustrator, and the visual reference block says avatar/sprite references are passed directly to the image generator after prompt creation.
contractLaneGate.primaryOwnerDetail: Engine generation and agent executor prompt assembly.
contractLaneGate.wrongLaneFixToAvoid: Do not hide the issue with a UI-only toast guard; the oversized payload must not be sent to the LLM request.
regressionProof: src/engine/agents-runtime/executor/agent-executor.illustrator.spec.ts fails on main because messages include image payloads, then passes after the fix.
src/engine/generation/start-generation.retry-agents.spec.ts confirms existing capped image-generation reference behavior remains intact.
pnpm check passed after the final code diff before PR creation.

positiveRows.claim: Illustrator LLM prompt requests do not carry image payloads.
positiveRows.evidence: pnpm vitest run src/engine/agents-runtime/executor/agent-executor.illustrator.spec.ts passed with 1 test after the fix.

positiveRows.claim: The regression test catches the previous bad request shape.
positiveRows.evidence: The same focused test failed before the production change because a captured message had images attached.

positiveRows.claim: Image-generation references remain capped and retry behavior still works.
positiveRows.evidence: pnpm vitest run src/engine/generation/start-generation.retry-agents.spec.ts passed with 20 tests.

positiveRows.claim: The PR preserves TypeScript and architecture boundaries.
positiveRows.evidence: pnpm typecheck and pnpm check:architecture passed.

positiveRows.claim: The repo gate was green before PR creation.
positiveRows.evidence: pnpm check passed, including line endings, scratch, architecture, storage contracts, frontend, Rust, docs, discovery, agent workflow, launcher safety, and warning-only unused-code reporting.

contradictionRows.claim: Reference images should still be available to the actual image generator when enabled.
contradictionRows.evidence: Existing start-generation retry tests cover illustrationReferenceImagesForRequest and serialized request byte caps; this PR did not remove that path.

contradictionRows.claim: Prompt text should still know which subjects have references.
contradictionRows.evidence: The visual_references text block keeps ordered subject names and owner types while removing image payload attachment.

untestedRows: No live Pi browser click was captured after the fix because the local in-app browser connector failed before shipping.

ownedFacts.description: Nginx on the Pi did not log HTTP 413 responses around the reported clicks, making an upstream provider payload rejection more likely than the Pi web proxy body limit.
ownedFacts.evidence: Live Pi log inspection in the debugging session found zero nginx 413 responses while the app surfaced Remote runtime returned 413.

ownedFacts.description: Image-generation reference payloads already have a 16 MiB serialized request cap on main.
ownedFacts.evidence: src/engine/generation-core/images/illustration-reference-selection.ts and src/engine/generation/start-generation.ts enforce the image request cap.

manualBlockers.reason: The code-level request shape is directly covered by the regression test; the Pi needs merged container images before a live click can verify the deployed behavior.

negativeRowsTested: Captured LLM messages must not include message.images
Captured serialized LLM messages must not include the base64 reference image string

pr.checks: local pnpm check passed before PR creation; CI pending at ledger creation
